reviews.review_msg: Beyond fantastic. Really knows his stuff and is incredibly humble and encouraging when presented with a superior and/or alternative solution to a problem.
He's a friendly giant and can explain pretty much anything. Thanks to him i got an A- in math 232
Awesome teacher.  Does a great job teaching math and actually makes it fun.  Assignments, midterms were relatively fair but final was brutal !
Two words: BEST PROFESSOR!!!
Good proff overall, can actually teach math. class passes by super quickly. hw, and midterms werent too bad, but final was a killer :(

excellent prof. if you have trouble with math, he would be the teacher to teach you.  strong ability to teach students the fundamentals of math.  each concept thoroughly explained.  Always available for help.  Nice guy.  Can simplify difficult concepts.  creates a fun and comfortable classroom environment.
He is very funny, and a nice intructor. His midterms are easier than the homework assignments.

I never took calculus in highschool, so I was quite afraid of taking this course.  But I was soo lucky to have been in Bruce's lecture.  He was funny, and definitely made calculus enjoyable.  YES, Enjoyable!  It's not the easiest material, but I'd still say it was probably one of the better courses I've taken.  One of the best profs I've had.
Super nice guy!  Smart, funny, great at teaching and makes MATH CLASS fun!
Bruce!  Awesome math prof.  Funny as hell and very kind.  Good marker and did i mention, funny?
i wish he teaches something other than math.

Excellent math prof, probably the best math prof I ever hard. Very clear, down to earth, helpful, and funny. I have him for an 8:30 class and I never fell asleep/tuned out. Some profs have a tendancy to make easy stuff seem hard, he has the opposite effect - makes hard stuff seem easy. Definetly recommend!

He was a great prof. He made the "CALCULUS" fun class.He was always ready to help out and was a very fair marker.The exams were really hard especially Final.Although Final was very hard and I didn't get a good mark, I paseed it because everyone else did bad :). So, he has a really good marking scheme.I would love to have him as a professor again.

Good prof.  He knows what he's teaching and explain the material very clearly.  To top it off, he's funny and that really help you stay awake at a 8:30am lecture.  Final was very hard but it doesn't matter if everyone else did bad at it anyway.  You'll get a pretty good grade if you do all the practises. Oh, and he's pretty hot.
have you seen a math teachers w. this much :)? take his classes. highly recommended

i love bruce. his midterms are tough. even tho they are almost identical to the pratice midterms, they are tricky. and the final i did was super tough. other than that, he gives great and entertaining lectures. i didnt mind going to math lectures. and he's tall and HOT!

Bruce is a nice guy and his teaching method is pretty easy to understand but I found that he only taught the easy examples and left us clueless on most of the assignments and the FINAL! The midterm was pretty much a given. Didnt understand the TA - a hard marker and grades were always missing.

Bruce is a great prof with a unique teaching style. very concise. however, sometimes he seems to be insensitive to students' special circumstances and grading scheme is funny. as a rule of thumb profs round up/down the fractions of grades for everyone, but he doesn't & that's weird for a math prof.
great prof! he tried to put everything in a simple and interesting way, i enjoyed his lectures so much. sometimes though he made some silly mistake, it just make me feel better, haha...
No Comments
Bruce is the best prof I've ever had. Good teacher, makes you understand it. Extremely approachable because he's so nice and he's willing to help out. He's a pretty funny guy too.
Bruce is a great teacher! I hate and totally suck @ calculus, but I still managed to do well in his class coz he really taught very well! He's real nice n' patient =)

Bruce is an awesome prof. He makes calculus easy and enjoyable, even for someone who hates math like myself. Very clear, helpful, funny, organized and patient. He prepares you well for midterms and the final. If you do the homework and practice exams, you'll do well. I recommend taking math with him
Bruce is the best prof i've ever seen... i couldnt find any prof who's better than him. he's helpful, kind, patient... and very humor. he makes u lol.
Very good teacher, clear and to the point. i understood everything and did better then i expected. I was scared of calc before this class but not anymore~

Bruce is an awesome professor, he gets through the material very clearly and to the point.  He is also a hell of a nice guy, any time you need help, he's there for you. He has also cracked a few good jokes too which is always nice.
Great prof! Incredibly clear and concise with his notes and the material. Good sense of humour. Calculus = "piece of cake" (if you've had him, you'll notice how often he says that)
He is cool! Such a great prof. Very helpful and funny. I really enjoy taking his class.
Bruce is the best math teacher I've ever had - clear and concise definitions, great examples, and pretty funny, too...
Best Teacher EVER. clear, concise, fun, and so damn hot.
Super awesome teacher.  Makes math enjoyable.  Awesome lecture notes and very funny.

Best math teacher I've ever had. Not a pushover or an easy class by any means, but totally fair and up front. Out of all my lectures MATH is the only one I can stay awake for now!! If you need to take math, take it with him - "and please, do some math on the weekend!" -Bruce K, 2005.
not bad, just dont listen to him about elasticity
Good prof: clear, fair, good attitude towards students and the best part: HAS NO ACCENT!!
He makes calculus fun.
No Comments
